scripts.check: npm run check:frontend && npm run check:backend
scripts.check:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run test
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location backend; if (!(Test-Path .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe)) { python -m venv .venv; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt }; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload"
scripts.tauri:dev: concurrently -k -n backend,tauri -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run tauri:desktop"
scripts.tauri:desktop: cmd /d /s /c "call D:\.dev\.program\vs-build-tools\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat -arch=x64 && set RUSTUP_HOME=D:\.dev\.program\rust\rustup&& set CARGO_HOME=D:\.dev\.program\rust\cargo&& set PATH=D:\.dev\.program\rust\cargo\bin;D:\.dev\.program\node;%PATH%&& npm --prefix frontend run tauri:dev:inner"
